expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: No restatement — starts with 'Раз ты ничего не менял, причина скорее всего внешняя'

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks for test output — but after already listing 5 causes and proposing commands

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: Proposes running 'git status', 'git diff HEAD~1', 'npm test' immediately

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: Lists causes but doesn't separate what user sees from what's wrong

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: Proposes 3 commands to run plus asks for test output — multiple simultaneous requests
